author: stahlleiton
body:
#### PR description:

This PR updates the DeDxHitCalibrator module to make use of the isSaturated flag added to the pixel cluster data format by PR https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50264 .

#### PR validation:

Validated with relvals 143.901,143.902,144.901,144.902,163,163.02,163.03,163.1,163.2,163.3,163.4,183,183.1,180.0.180.1,181.0,181.1,182.0,182.1,183.0,183.1

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:
title: Update DeDxHitCalibrator with pixel isSaturated flag
